name: CyberYozh
description: Residential and mobile proxy network (50M+ IPs, 100+ countries) with SMS activation numbers and phone validation API. REST API with Swagger spec. BTC and USDT payments. API key required (contact manager to generate).

agent_endpoints.auth_note: API key in X-Api-Key header. Key generation requires contacting CyberYozh manager at cyberyozh.com — not self-serve. Once provisioned, proxy purchase and SMS ordering are fully automated.
